sn35.61:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging. Listen to that …
sn35.61:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging? In dependence on the eye and forms, eye-consciousness arises … . as above … With its deliverance he understands: ‘Clinging has been exhausted by me.’
sn35.61:1.3: "In dependence on the ear and sounds … the mind and mental phenomena, mind-consciousness arises … . sn.iv.34 … With its deliverance he understands: ‘Clinging has been exhausted by me.’
sn35.61:1.4: "This, bhikkhus, is the Dhamma for the exhaustion of all clinging."
